tools.name: list_metrics
tools.description: List available metrics for the 26 Swiss cantons (key, label, unit, source, what higher/lower means).

tools.name: get_canton
tools.description: Get all metric values for one canton. canton = 2-letter abbreviation (e.g. ZH, GE, TI).

tools.name: rank_by_metric
tools.description: Rank all cantons by a metric. metric = a key from list_metrics; order = "high" or "low" (default high).

tools.name: compare_cantons
tools.description: Compare 2–4 cantons across all metrics. cantons = array of abbreviations.

tools.name: commune_tax
tools.description: Live income+wealth tax for a specific commune & household (official ESTV, year 2026). commune = name or postcode; income in CHF; married bool; children count; wealth in CHF.

tools.name: search_commune
tools.description: Find Swiss communes by name or postcode (official ESTV location register). Returns commune name, canton and postcode — use before commune_tax or estimate_net_move when the spelling is uncertain.

tools.name: estimate_net_move
tools.description: Estimate the net yearly CHF impact of moving between two Swiss communes for a household: live commune-level tax (official ESTV 2026) plus canton-average rent and health-premium differences. Positive savings = the move saves money. The flagship relocation calculation as a tool.

tools.name: get_trend
tools.description: Historical year-series for a metric in one canton (e.g. sunshine back to 1884, migration to 1981, rent to 2010). metric = key from list_metrics with history: rent_mean, net_migration_per_1000, foreigner_pct, sunshine_hours, balance_per_capita, beds_per_1000, jobs. Optional from_year.

tools.name: upcoming_votes
tools.description: The next Swiss federal vote dates and (once announced) the subjects on the ballot, in DE/FR/IT/EN (official Federal Chancellery / VoteInfo data).

tools.name: book_consultation
tools.description: Request a personal consultation with Mirabello Consultancy (Swiss relocation & investment-migration specialists) for questions beyond the data — international moves, residency, lump-sum taxation, wealth planning. Requires explicit consent to share contact details.
